body.visualDesc: Medium shot of the vegetable garden - rows of carrots and lettuce, tall sunflowers behind. Pip crouches beside the pale-cream egg, her wing hovering over it, her expression bright with surprise, looking toward camera. CRITICAL: the egg is PERFECTLY SMOOTH and COMPLETELY UNCRACKED - absolutely NO cracks or lines on the shell. The Big Oak is visible on a distant hill. Morning light casts long soft shadows across the soil.
